t_ch: …可恶。竟敢无视我！
t_en: ...Darn it. How dare you ignore me!

t_ch: 嘘。别东张西望，也别大声叫嚷，把我当成一台普通的机铠就好。不然会被她发现的。
t_en: Shh. Don't look around or make a fuss, just treat me like a normal mechatron. Otherwise, she'll notice.

t_ch: 是不是装错头了？
t_en: Did you put on the wrong head?

t_ch: 你是人类还是幻造种？
t_en: Are you human or imagenae?

t_ch: 哈？还不明白吗，我根本不是机铠。
t_en: Huh? Don't you get it yet? I'm not even a mechatron.

t_ch: 我叫修仁江，是异常防御部资源配置办公室的副组长。为了躲避她的追杀，我披上了这套机铠作伪装…却没想身躯太复杂，直接给我锁里面了。
t_en: I'm Sorren, Deputy Chief of the Resource Allocation Office at the Department of Aberration Defense. I put on this mechatron as a disguise to escape her pursuit... but I didn't expect it to be so complex that I got myself locked inside.

t_ch: 刚才一阵风吹掉了头盔，我又不能弯腰，捡不起来，现在纯纯成了个显眼包。
t_en: The wind just blew my helmet off, and I can't bend down to pick it up, so now I'm just a straight-up walking target.

t_ch: 你来得正好，快帮我把这玩意脱下来。等顺利回到异常防御部，必有重谢！
t_en: Perfect timing! Quick, help me get this thing off. Once we make it back to the Department of Aberration Defense, I'll make it worth your while!

t_ch: 我帮你报警吧？
t_en: Should I call the police for you?

t_ch: 啊？你说报警…不行不行，要是让治安局知道了，对我们的影响多不好。
t_en: Huh? Call the police...? Absolutely not. The last thing we need is the Security Bureau catching wind of this. It would be a disaster for us.

t_ch: 所以，「她」到底是谁？
t_en: So, who exactly is "she?"

t_ch: 「她」到底是谁？
t_en: Who exactly is "she?"

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>她…是我的前女友</color>——没时间解释，你先把我放出来，求求了！
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>She's... my ex-girlfriend</color>. No time to explain, just get me out of here, please! I'm begging you!

t_ch: 呵。为自己换上机铠的皮囊，是不打算做人了嘛？
t_en: Heh. Swapping your flesh for a mechatron shell? Guess you're done being human, huh?

t_ch: 亲爱的，没必要害怕呀。或许，我们可以从头开始，从我们初遇的时候开始……
t_en: Darling, there's no need to be afraid. Perhaps we can start over, from the moment we first met...

t_ch: 不知从何处传来的话语，低沉、喑哑而阴冷，像是故事中索命的诅咒，久久萦绕不散。
t_en: Low, hoarse, icy. The voice is nowhere and everywhere. Like a curse out of a ghost tale, clinging to the air long after it should've faded.

t_ch: 听、听听听见了吗！她要杀了我，要永远缠着我！快救我，这是见义勇为！
t_en: D—D—Did you hear that!? She's gonna kill me, she's gonna haunt me forever! Help me, quick! It's your civic duty!

t_ch: 行吧，就是顺手的事。
t_en: Alright, it's no big deal anyway.

t_ch: 我要是不帮呢？
t_en: And if I don't wanna help?

t_ch: 我、我我我…我就只能死给你看了啊！我是个无能的职员，你也不想看一个无辜的路人惨死在面前吧？
t_en: W—Well... I—I'll just drop dead right here, then! See? I'm a hopeless, useless cog! And you don't want the guilt of some innocent bystander's death on your conscience, do you?

t_ch: 就当做件好事，为自己攒点功德。帮帮我，{F#姐}{M#哥}，好吗？
t_en: Come on, think of it as a good deed for your karma score. Do a guy a solid, {F#sis}{M#bro}, please?

t_ch: 既然都说到这个份上了…
t_en: Well, since you put it that way...

t_ch: 机甲被球棒攻击的声音（临时文本）
t_en: Sound of mech being hit by bat (temp text)

t_ch: 你做得好啊！现在，让我们跑起来吧，被她抓到就完蛋了。
t_en: Nice job! Now, let's make a run for it. If she catches us, it's over.

t_ch: 跑快些！她失去的只是愿力，而我赌上的可是这条命啊！
t_en: Faster! She'll only lose some Wishpower, but I'm betting my actual life here!

t_ch: （愿力…莫非追杀他的人是幻造种么？）
t_en: (Wishpower... so the one chasing him is an imagenae?)

t_ch: 呼，呼…应该暂时甩掉她了。就在这休息会吧，我有点跑不动了。
t_en: Huff... Huff... looks like we lost her for now. Let's... catch our breath. I can barely run anymore.

t_ch: 对了，谢谢你啊。嗯，你做了件好事，该为自己感到骄傲！
t_en: Oh right, thanks! Really. You did a good thing. Feel free to be proud of yourself!

t_ch: 到底是怎么回事？
t_en: What was all that about?

t_ch: 你还是先把事情说清楚吧。
t_en: Mind telling me what's actually going on?

t_ch: 如你所见，我正在被心爱的人追杀。最近，我的梦里出现的全都是她的面容。
t_en: As you can see, I'm being hunted down by the love of my life. Lately, her face is all I see in my dreams.

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>她的名字叫「沙蒲」，是我的女朋友。我们已经认识快一个月了。</color>从没有谁能像她这样牵动我的心弦。
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>Her name is Sapone, and she's my girlfriend. It's been almost a month since we met.</color> No one has ever stirred my soul quite this way before.

t_ch: 如果我是幻造种，她便是照亮{RUBY_B#二维市第一深情}我{RUBY_E#}的那轮幻月。她是光，是食粮是养分，是我的一切。
t_en: If I am an imagenae, then she is the Phantasmoon that illuminates {RUBY_B#Duomension City's No. 1 Romeo}me{RUBY_E#}. She is my light, my sustenance, my everything.

t_ch: 但几天前，她突然像换了个人似的，变得充满敌意。我原以为她只是心情不好，需要静静。直到今天清晨，我从梦中醒来，发现她拿着刀站在我床前……
t_en: But a few days ago, she suddenly changed into a completely different person, radiating pure hostility. I thought she was just in a bad mood and needed some space. Until this morning, when I woke up from my dream and found her standing by my bed with a knife...

t_ch: 她一定是被什么灾异给占据了，才会如此践踏我们的感情！
t_en: This isn't her! Some aberration must have possessed her, to make her desecrate what we had!

t_ch: 我先确认，她是幻造种么？
t_en: Let me get this straight. Is she an imagenae?

t_ch: 对…是个很漂亮的小姑娘。故事的开始总是某次不期而遇的邂逅，我一见钟情，而她没有拒绝。突如其来的爱情就这么顺理成章地发生了。
t_en: Yeah... a really pretty one, too. Every story begins with an unexpected encounter. I fell in love at first sight, and she didn't turn me away. Just like that, love blossomed naturally and unexpectedly.

t_ch: 然后是妙不可言的热恋，我彻底沦陷在她的温柔中——我们实在太过契合，至少她很契合我，每个点都完美切中我的喜好。
t_en: Then came the blissful honeymoon phase. I was completely lost in her tenderness. We are just so compatible, or at least she's compatible with me. Somehow, she just hits all my sweet spots perfectly.

t_ch: 人总是会反复爱上同一个人，哪怕千次、万次。这是让爱情永葆青春的奥秘。
t_en: The heart finds its way back to the same soul, a thousand times, ten thousand. That is the secret that keeps love forever young.

t_ch: 咳…扯远了。是的，她是个幻造种，但也是我最爱的人。
t_en: Ahem... I digress. It's true, she is an imagenae. But my heart is hers, and that is my truth.

t_ch: 还有这种灾异？
t_en: There's an Abberation like that?

t_ch: 有的，朋友，就我所知是有的。总有心术不正的人，肆意散播模因病毒，将人们心爱的幻造种弄得面目全非。
t_en: Yes, my friend, as far as I know, there are. People with twisted hearts sow memetic viruses so recklessly that they warp others' beloved imagenae into dreadful monsters.

t_ch: 你知道的，它们藉着愿力与强烈的情绪而生，因此，也只需稍加操控，便会变得极为可怕——我心爱的她，肯定也是被坏人利用了！
t_en: You know, they are born of Wishpower and raw emotions, so with just a little manipulation, they can become absolutely terrifying. My sweet Sapone must have been used by some bad people!

t_ch: 接下来有什么打算？
t_en: What do you want to do now?

t_ch: 我、我不知道。事已至此，我除了活命已经别无所求了。
t_en: I—I don't know. At this point, all I want is to stay alive.

t_ch: 沙蒲，我的沙蒲，你为什么会变成这样…在你心里，究竟把我们的爱情置于何处呢？
t_en: Sapone, my Sapone, why have you become like this... What did our love mean to you...?

t_ch: <size=28>——噫呀！</size>
t_en: <size=28>Eek!</size>

t_ch: 顺着他惊恐的目光望去，嘈杂人群中，有个少女正冷眼看着这里。没有表情，没有言语。
t_en: Following his terrified gaze through the noisy crowd, there was a young girl staring coldly at this spot. No expression, no words.

t_ch: 即便是繁华的街头，那眼神中透出的恨意也依旧令人后背发凉。
t_en: Even on a bustling street, the hatred in that gaze still cut through the air, sending chills down your spine.

t_ch: 她就是你说的「沙蒲」？
t_en: Is that the Sapone you were talking about?

t_ch: 是。或者说…曾经是沙蒲，但现在，她已经是只想行凶的灾异了。
t_en: Yes. Or rather... she was once Sapone, but now, she's nothing but an Abberation consumed by bloodlust.

t_ch: 我去和她聊聊。
t_en: I'll go talk to her.

t_ch: 别。你以为我没试过吗？！讲道理是行不通的，现在，她是只想行凶的灾异。
t_en: Don't. You think I haven't tried that!? Reasoning won't work. Now she's just an aberration out for blood.

t_ch: 为了我…还有你的安全着想，尽量躲远些吧。
t_en: For my sake, and for yours... I'm begging you, stay away.

t_ch: 你不要命了吗？！失控的幻造种很恐怖的，跟我往这边跑！
t_en: Are you out of your mind!? Those out-of-control imagenae are terrifying. Follow me this way!

t_ch: …好像甩掉了。啧，真麻烦，就不能让我省点心吗！
t_en: ...Looks like we lost her. Tch, what a pain. Just give me a break for once!

t_ch: 哎呀，修仁江，你来得正好！沙蒲才刚走呢，还说要是你来了，记得带句话。
t_en: Oh, perfect timing, Sorren! Sapone just left, and she asked me to pass on a message if you showed up.

t_ch: 噫！她、她她她…猜到了我要过来？
t_en: Eek! She... she she she... knew I'd come!?

t_ch: 说什么呢？你们不是常来这约会吗，莫非吵架了？算了，情侣的事，我也不多问。
t_en: Huh? Aren't you two always here on dates? What, you two had a falling out? Ah, never mind. I won't pry into your relationship drama.

t_ch: 沙蒲让我告诉你：「她们，会一直等你的。」
t_en: Sapone asked me to tell you: "They will always be waiting for you."

t_ch: 噢？「她们」？
t_en: Oh? "They?"

t_ch: 看来你犯的错不少啊。
t_en: Looks like you've made quite a few mistakes there.

t_ch: 啊？等等，别看我，我可没有到处拈花惹草。我发誓，我也不知道这是什么意思啊！
t_en: Huh? Wait, don't look at me like that. I'm not some playboy flirting around. I swear, I'm just as clueless as you are!

t_ch: 我也不明白。不过，既然本人回来了，不如，就让她自己来解释吧。
t_en: I don't get it either. But since she's back now, why don't we let her explain it herself?

t_ch: 你、你说什么？她…回来了？
t_en: Wh—What did you say? She's... back?

t_ch: 是呀。我们…难道你都忘了吗？亲爱的，对我们来说，这可是*刻骨铭心*的回忆啊。
t_en: Yeah. We... have you forgotten? My love, for us, this is a memory "etched into our very souls."

t_ch: <size=28>啊！！！！</size>
t_en: <size=28>Eeeeek!!!</size>

t_ch: <size=28>——追上来了，快跑啊！！！</size>
t_en: <size=28>She's here! RUN!!!</size>

t_ch: 猛烈的眩晕感向你袭来，仿佛被卷入了漩涡的最中心。
t_en: A violent wave of dizziness hits you, as if you've been sucked into the heart of a vortex.

t_ch: 据说，幻月满月期间，灾异的频率与凶险程度都会得到显著提升。而眼前的少女仍旧面无表情地望着远方，像是在凝视虚空，又像是静待着某处的猎物落网。
t_en: Legend has it that during the full Phantasmoon, aberrations not only multiply but grow far more dangerous. The girl, however, was perfectly blank-faced, her gaze fixed on the distance as if contemplating the void, or awaiting prey to fall into her trap.

t_ch: 而后，尖叫声撕裂了静寂——
t_en: Then, a scream tears through the silence...

t_ch: <size=36>等…救命啊！！！</size>
t_en: <size=36>W—Wait... HELP!!!</size>

t_ch: 沙蒲，沙蒲，还是沙蒲…无数的沙蒲映入眼帘，密密麻麻的沙蒲占据了整条街道。
t_en: Sapone, Sapone, and more Sapone... Countless Sapones fill your vision, swarms of Sapones crowding the entire street.

t_ch: 别…不要杀我。救命…求你了……
t_en: No... please don't kill me. Help... I beg you...

t_ch: 亲爱的，你是怎么了？为什么要逃呢，不是说好要和我过一辈子的吗？
t_en: Darling, what's wrong? Why are you running away? Didn't you promise we'd be together forever?

t_ch: 我、我是说过，可那不是现在的你啊！瞧瞧你自己吧，多吓人，要我怎么去爱你？！
t_en: I—I did! But that wasn't... this you! Just look at yourself! You're terrifying! How am I supposed to love you like this!?

t_ch: 并且我有什么错？！我不过是想要<color=#dbc291ff>最完美、永远不会结束的爱情</color>。我是真心爱你的！
t_en: And what did I do wrong!? All I ever wanted was <color=#dbc291ff>a perfect, eternal love</color>. My love for you was real!

t_ch: 难道不对吗？爱情不就是这样吗？新鲜、纯粹、令人着迷，反倒是你，要的太多了！
t_en: Am I wrong? Isn't that what love is all about? Fresh, pure, intoxicating. If anything, you're the one who's asking for too much!

t_ch: <size=28>——你才是亵渎我们之间爱情的那个！！！</size>
t_en: <size=28>YOU'RE the one desecrating our love!!!</size>

t_ch: 亲爱的……
t_en: My love...

t_ch: 我爱你…每个月都爱着你。
t_en: I love you... I love you every single month.

t_ch: 喂，我爱你呀，你听见了吗？
t_en: Hey, I love you. Are you listening?

t_ch: 别喊了…别缠着我了。求你了…好吗？
t_en: Stop yelling... Stop pestering me. Please... okay?

t_ch: 球棒浣熊，快！救救我！我创造的幻造种暴走了，变成了怪物，她想杀了我！
t_en: Baseball Raccoon, now! Do something! My imagenae creation has gone berserk and turned into a monster. She's trying to kill me!

t_ch: 原来你认识我。
t_en: So you do know me.

t_ch: 但凡上点网的人，谁不知道你的名号！别管那么多了，她们人多势众，救我！
t_en: Anyone who's been on the internet knows who you are! Forget about all that. There's a horde of her! Help me!

t_ch: 你察觉到，名为「沙蒲」的少女们，在听到「球棒浣熊」这个称号时，眼神似乎朝你的方位动了动。
t_en: You notice that when the title "Baseball Raccoon" is mentioned, the girls named Sapone seem to shift their gaze slightly in your direction.

t_ch: 沙蒲…是你创造的幻造种？
t_en: Sapone... is the imagenae you created?

t_ch: 有问题吗？我创造了她，又爱上了她，反过来也行。《灵物保护法》早就承认，幻造种和人类之间可以有真爱。何况，我渴望的感情，只有她能给我。
t_en: Is there a problem? I created her and then fell in love with her, or the other way around. It doesn't matter. The Faekind Protection Act has long affirmed that true love is possible between humans and imagenae. Besides, she's the only one who can give me the affection I yearn for.

t_ch: 但无论如何，杀人是违法的！你必须帮我！
t_en: Anyway, murder is illegal! You have to help me!

t_ch: 我可以联系异常防御部来处理。
t_en: I can contact the Department of Aberration Defense to handle this.

t_ch: 啊？不行，那是我上班的地方，要是这件事被同事知道了，我还哪有颜面见人！
t_en: Huh? No way, that's where I work! If my colleagues find out about this, I won't be able to face them!

t_ch: 我要弄清楚具体情况。
t_en: I need to figure out what's exactly going on.

t_ch: 啊？有什么不清楚的吗？幻造种成了灾异，公然在大街上行凶。这还不够？
t_en: Huh? Which part are you confused about? The imagenae turned into aberrations, wreaking havoc on the streets. Isn't that enough?

t_ch: 我说，你就不能用你那无敌的球棒想想办法吗？解决几个幻造种而已，「嘭」的一下——对你来说绝对不难吧？
t_en: Hey, can't you figure something out with that invincible bat of yours? Taking out a few imagenae should be a piece of cake. Just "wham!" And it's done, right?

t_ch: 还是说，球棒浣熊根本不想为遇到困难的人主持正义？！
t_en: Or is the Baseball Raccoon just not interested in serving justice for those in need!?

t_ch: …不是这样的！
t_en: ...That's not true!

t_ch: 似乎被话语中的言辞刺激到了，霎时间，所有「沙蒲」都抬起了手。
t_en: Seemingly provoked by the words, all Sapones simultaneously raise their hands.

t_ch: 哇啊啊啊啊——
t_en: Gahhhh!

t_ch: 顺着沙蒲所指的方向望去，你见到了一块斑驳的画板，上面的画布若隐若现。
t_en: Following Sapone's finger, you spot a weathered drawing board with a faint, flickering canvas.

t_ch: 这是…「我」。请看一看吧，这是「我」。
t_en: This is... "me." Please take a look at "me."

t_ch: 色彩繁杂的画布仿佛被人反复涂抹过，其上的内容早已模糊不清。但你依稀能辨认出人影的轮廓，以及写在画框边缘的那行小字。
t_en: The chaotic colors on the canvas have been layered over so many times that the subject is a total blur. Even so, you can just barely make out a silhouette and a tiny line of text on the edge of the frame.

t_ch: 「致沙蒲，我最爱的人。」后方，「修仁江」的签名赫然可见。
t_en: "To Sapone, the love of my life." At the bottom, the signature "Sorren" is clearly visible.

t_ch: 这是…「我」。请看一看吧，这是「我」。
t_en: This is... "me." Please take a look at "me."

t_ch: （触碰画框）
t_en: (Touch the frame)

t_ch: 浓重色彩瞬间包裹了你的意识，随之而来的，除却油墨的刺鼻气味外，还有一丝……
t_en: Intense colors instantly envelop your consciousness, and along with it, besides the pungent smell of ink, there's also a hint of...

t_ch: 掺杂着银杏香气的苦涩。
t_en: ...Bitterness intertwined with the scent of ginkgo leaves.

t_ch: 尝试与沙蒲搭话。
t_en: Try to talk to Sapone.

t_ch: 这是…「我」。请看一看吧，这是「我」。
t_en: This is... "me." Please take a look at "me."

t_ch: 沙蒲并未对你的话语作出反应，或许，她的意识本就残缺不全，早已失去了与外界正常沟通的能力。看来你没法征询她的意见了。
t_en: Sapone shows no reaction to your words. Perhaps her consciousness is already fragmented and incomplete, and she has lost the ability to communicate with the outside world. It seems you won't be able to get her opinion on this.

t_ch: 什么也不做。
t_en: Do nothing.

t_ch: 这是…「我」。请看一看吧，这是「我」。
t_en: This is... "me." Please take a look at "me."

t_ch: 沙蒲依旧重复着机械性的话语，但此刻的你并不想贸然深入事件的中心。
t_en: Sapone keeps repeating her mechanical words, but right now you don't want to rashly dive into the truth behind this incident.

t_ch: 修仁江的神色依旧呆滞，似乎还未从刚才的惊慌中缓过神来。
t_en: Sorren's expression remains blank, as if he still hasn't recovered from his earlier panic.

t_ch: 你的意识陡然返回现实，仿佛从深沉无光的溺水中醒来。
t_en: Your consciousness suddenly snaps back to reality, like waking up from drowning in a deep, lightless abyss.

t_ch: 沙蒲，沙蒲，还是沙蒲…无数的沙蒲映入眼帘，密密麻麻的沙蒲占据了整条街道。
t_en: Sapone, Sapone, and more Sapone... Countless Sapones fill your vision, swarms of Sapones crowding the entire street.

t_ch: 但你现在明白了，这并非无来由的灾异，而是一场漫长的、属于无声者的复仇。
t_en: But now you understand this isn't some random aberration, but a long-drawn revenge orchestrated by the voiceless.

t_ch: 所有「沙蒲」仍旧向虚空伸着手，而此刻的你决定——
t_en: All the Sapones are still reaching out into the void, and at this moment, you decide to...

t_ch: 握住沙蒲的手。
t_en: Hold Sapone's hand.

t_ch: （回应沙蒲的愿望，也就意味着对修仁江坐视不管。我做好准备了吗？）
t_en: (Granting Sapone's wish means turning a blind eye to Sorren. Am I ready for that?)

t_ch: 那是他罪有应得。
t_en: He deserves it.

t_ch: 再想想吧。
t_en: Let's think about it.

t_ch: 联系异常防御部的治安官。
t_en: Contact the Department of Aberration Defense security officer.

t_ch: （交给官方处理，也就意味着要阻止沙蒲的行为。我做好准备了吗？）
t_en: (Leaving it to the authorities means stopping Sapone's actions. Am I ready for that?)

t_ch: 他应当受到法律制裁。
t_en: He should face legal consequences.

t_ch: 再想想吧。
t_en: Let's think about it.

t_ch: 后面的事，就交给你了…沙蒲。
t_en: I'm leaving the rest to you... Sapone.

t_ch: 你似乎看见沙蒲向你轻轻点了点头，表示她听到了。当然，这也可能是你看错了。
t_en: You seem to see Sapone nodding gently at you, indicating she heard you. Though, you might have just imagined it.

t_ch: 哈。我听说过，爱情就像是橘子，即使内部早已腐烂，外表看上去还是爱情的形状。
t_en: Hah. I've heard that love is like a tangerine. Even when its inside has rotted, the outside still keeps the shape of happiness.

t_ch: 可我不愿意接受。大部分人的爱情早就死了，我不过是让它结束在最美的那刻，又让它从灰烬中重生。我要的是最纯粹、最完美的爱情。一如既往，从未改变。
t_en: But I disagree with that. Most people's love has long since died, yet I merely let it end at its most mesmerizing moment, and then let it rise from the ashes. What I seek is the purest, most perfect love. This has always been my approach, always.

t_ch: <size=36>这就是我的人生答案，我的欢愉！</size>
t_en: <size=36>This is my life's answer, my Elation!</size>

t_ch: 意识到结局既定，面对曾经的爱人，修仁江发出了最后的呼号。
t_en: Realizing the inevitable end, Sorren lets out his final cry in front of his former lover.

t_ch: 无论如何，你还是选择转过身去，不再观看这出荒唐戏的后续发展。毕竟——
t_en: Either way, you choose to turn away, no longer interested in watching how this absurd show plays out. After all...

t_ch: 他，还有她们…都算是得偿所愿了吧。
t_en: He, and they... I guess they all got what they wanted.

t_ch: 数日后…
t_en: A few days later...

t_ch: 听治安局的人说，最近发生了起规模浩大的灾异事件。有个叫「沙蒲」的幻造种，把自己变成了好多份，闹挺厉害的。
t_en: Word from the Security Bureau is that there's been a massive Aberration event lately. An imagenae called Sapone split herself into multiple copies and caused quite a ruckus.

t_ch: 灾异倒是很快平息了，没造成什么损害。但她引起了足够的关注。顺着线索查下去，那群人找到了罪证——塞满了信封的包裹，就放在事发现场。
t_en: The aberration subsided quickly, causing no real damage. But she had drawn enough attention. Following the leads, they found the evidence right at the scene: A package stuffed with envelopes.

t_ch: 那个画师主动投案了，估计她最开始就有这个打算。或许惹了什么人，打算避避吧。
t_en: That artist turned herself in. She probably planned this from the start. Maybe she got on someone's bad side and needed to lie low for a while.

t_ch: 私造幻造种的那个官员，修仁江，倒是从世界上消失了。是死是活，现在还没个说法。
t_en: That official who illegally created imagenae, Sorren, has vanished. Is he alive or dead? We don't have an answer right now.

t_ch: 关于这件事，你知道什么吗？
t_en: What do you know about this?

t_ch: 什么都不知道！
t_en: I don't know anything!

t_ch: 我猜，他肯定是个很坏的人。
t_en: I bet he's definitely a bad person.

t_ch: 那好。
t_en: Alright then.

t_ch: 如果有治安局的人来问，那天晚上你干了什么，你就说，在跟我一起吃拉面。
t_en: If anyone from the Security Bureau asks what you were doing that night, just tell them you were having hand-stretched noodles with me.

t_ch: 我知道你恨他，但私刑解决不了问题。把裁决交给法律，这才能称为公道。
t_en: I know you hate him, but vigilante justice won't solve anything. Let the law handle the punishment, which is what real justice looks like.

t_ch: 并且，将事件公之于众，也能避免像你这样的悲剧再度发生。
t_en: Besides, making this incident public will help prevent tragedies like yours from happening again.

t_ch: 我保证，他不会躲过应有的制裁。
t_en: I promise, he won't escape the punishment he deserves.

t_ch: 你似乎看见沙蒲向你轻轻点了点头，表示她许可了。当然，这也可能是你看错了。
t_en: You seem to see Sapone nodding gently at you, indicating her approval. Though, you might have just imagined it.

t_ch: 哈。我听说过，爱情就像是橘子，即使内部早已腐烂，外表看上去还是爱情的形状。
t_en: Hah. I've heard that love is like a tangerine. Even when its inside has rotted, the outside still keeps the shape of happiness.

t_ch: 可我不愿意接受。大部分人的爱情早就死了，我不过是让它结束在最美的那刻，又让它从灰烬中重生。我要的是最纯粹、最完美的爱情。一如既往，从未改变。
t_en: But I disagree with that. Most people's love has long since died, yet I merely let it end at its most mesmerizing moment, and then let it rise from the ashes. What I seek is the purest, most perfect love. This has always been my approach, always.

t_ch: 这就是我的人生答案，我的欢愉。我不会后悔。
t_en: This is my life's answer, my Elation. I have no regrets.

t_ch: 这些话，还是留到审判席上去讲吧。这里没有人在乎你的想法。
t_en: Save those words for the tribunal. No one here cares what you think.

t_ch: 无论如何，你选择掏出手机，将事情的来龙去脉讲述给了对面的治安官——某个为私欲而践踏人性的官员，还有某个遭到残忍对待的幻造种。
t_en: Regardless, you choose to take out your phone and tell the officer everything that happened, about an official who trampled on humanity for his own selfish desires, and about an imagenae who underwent cruel abuse.

t_ch: 过程中，沙蒲只是静静地看着，直到你挂上电话，直到异常防御部的警车呼啸而到。
t_en: Sapone just stares at you in silence until you hang up the phone, and until the cars of the Department of Aberration Defense come wailing in.

t_ch: 然后，在你没注意到的时候，静静地化作了满地的尘灵。
t_en: Then, before you can notice it, she quietly dissolves into wispae, scattering across the ground.

t_ch: 原本放着画板的地方，不知何时多出了一个装满信封的包裹。你知道，那些都是罪证。
t_en: Where the easel once stood, there is now a package full of envelopes. You know those are all evidence of the crime.

t_ch: 谢谢你，沙蒲。最后还是选择了信任我。
t_en: Thank you, Sapone. In the end, you chose to trust me.

t_ch: 哎，网友们总是不肯放过哪怕再小的瓜。不过没办法，这就是二相乐园。
t_en: *sigh* Netizens never let even the tiniest bit of gossip slip by. But what can you do? That's just how things are in Planarcadia.

t_ch: 说回你报的案子吧。修仁江算是我的熟人，在办公室打过招呼的那种，这事刚爆出来的时候，整座楼都沸腾了。而我呢，也总算过了把抓同事的瘾。
t_en: Back to the case you reported. Sorren was sort of an acquaintance of mine. You know, the kind you exchange greetings with at the office. When this whole thing blew up, the entire building was in an uproar. And me? Well, I finally got to scratch that itch of arresting a colleague.

t_ch: 虽然判决书还没下，不出意外的话，他的后半辈子只能在监狱里度过了。
t_en: Although the verdict hasn't been handed down yet, barring any surprises, he'll be spending the rest of his life behind bars.

t_ch: 请绝对不要给他减刑。
t_en: Please never reduce his sentence.

t_ch: 别担心，大家都是这么觉得的。私自创造幻造种的案子层出不穷，而在其中，修仁江犯的事也算是性质头等恶劣的。
t_en: Don't worry, everyone feels the same way. Cases of unauthorized imagenesis keep popping up, and among them, Sorren's case is considered one of the most heinous.

t_ch: 再加上，那个画师主动投案自首了，所以公众情绪都集中在了他身上。就算放他出去，怕是也会被那些自诩公义的人追讨。
t_en: Plus, since that artist turned herself in voluntarily, all the public outrage is focused on him. Even if he's released, those self-proclaimed justice warriors would probably go after him.

t_ch: 唉，也好，这就是狂热寻求欢愉的下场吧。
t_en: *sigh* Well, I guess that's what happens when you're obsessed with Elation.

t_ch: 你来了……
t_en: You're here...

t_ch: 听治安局的人说，最近发生了起规模浩大的灾异事件。有个叫「沙蒲」的幻造种，把自己变成了好多份，闹挺厉害的。
t_en: Word from the Security Bureau is that there's been a massive Aberration event lately. An imagenae called Sapone split herself into multiple copies and caused quite a ruckus.

t_ch: 灾异倒是很快平息了，没造成什么损害。但她引起了足够的关注。顺着线索查下去，那群人找到了罪证——塞满了信封的包裹，就放在事发现场。
t_en: The aberration subsided quickly, causing no real damage. But she had drawn enough attention. Following the leads, they found the evidence right at the scene: A package stuffed with envelopes.

t_ch: 那个画师主动投案了，估计她最开始就有这个打算。或许惹了什么人，打算避避吧。
t_en: That artist turned herself in. She probably planned this from the start. Maybe she got on someone's bad side and needed to lie low for a while.

t_ch: 私造幻造种的那个官员，修仁江，倒是从世界上消失了。是死是活，现在还没个说法。
t_en: That official who illegally created imagenae, Sorren, has vanished. Is he alive or dead? We don't have an answer right now.

t_ch: 关于这件事，你知道什么吗？
t_en: What do you know about this?

t_ch: 什么都不知道！
t_en: I don't know anything!

t_ch: 我猜，他肯定是个很坏的人。
t_en: I bet he's definitely a bad person.

t_ch: 那好。
t_en: Alright then.

t_ch: 如果有治安局的人来问，那天晚上你干了什么，你就说，在跟我一起吃拉面。
t_en: If anyone from the Security Bureau asks what you were doing that night, just tell them you were having hand-stretched noodles with me.

t_ch: （这是…沙蒲的记忆？或许可以在这里找到事件的线索。）
t_en: (Is this... Sapone's memory? Maybe I can find some clues about the incident here.)

t_ch: 天哪！她就是我的梦中情人！毫不夸张地说，她满足了我对爱情的一切幻想。
t_en: Oh my! She's literally the girl of my dreams! No exaggeration, she checks every single box on my romance wishlist.

t_ch: 如绘画般精致的面容，孩童般纯真的意念，还有那最重要的…一颗绝对爱我的心。
t_en: A face as delicate as a painting, genuine and endearing, and most importantly... a heart that loves me absolutely.

t_ch: 啊，爱情总是突如其来，我没想到会在此处和它撞个满怀！你太厉害了，真的！
t_en: Ah, love always strikes when you least expect it, and here I am, running right into it! You're amazing, seriously!

t_ch: 哈哈哈，我的原则向来很简单——满足顾客的需求，想要什么样，我都能给你画出来。
t_en: Hahaha, my principle has always been simple: to satisfy the customers' needs. Whatever you want, I can draw it for you.

t_ch: 不过，你知道，私人创作是违法的。风险总是意味着代价。嗯？
t_en: But you know, private creation is illegal. Risks always come with a price. Huh?

t_ch: 明白。异常防御部的许可证，保证以假乱真，就跟你绘画的技法一样高超！她叫什么？
t_en: Got it. The Department of Aberration Defense license, guaranteed to be as convincing as your illustration skills! What's her name?

t_ch: 名字是最初的牵绊。命名这种特权，当然要交由顾客决定。
t_en: Names are the first connection. The privilege of naming, of course, should be left to the customer.

t_ch: 嗯。让我想想…想想…你喜欢什么？
t_en: Hmm. Let me think... think... what do you like?

t_ch: 我…喜欢…修…仁江。
t_en: I... like... Sor... ren.

t_ch: 直接的告白，令我的心脏砰砰直跳！啊，少女的情话总是如此美妙，怎么都听不腻！
t_en: Such a direct confession makes my heart race! Ah, a young girl's sweet whispers are always so wonderful, I could listen to them forever!

t_ch: 那么，下个问题，你想得到什么？
t_en: So, next question, what do you want?

t_ch: 我…想得到…修…仁江的喜欢。
t_en: I... want... Sor... ren... to like me.

t_ch: 可以。若是你能永远保持我爱的模样，我也会毫无保留地向你献出我全部的爱。
t_en: Alright. If you can forever remain the way I love you, I'll give you all my love without holding anything back.

t_ch: 继续吧。下个问题，你想成为什么样的人？
t_en: Let's continue. Next question, what kind of person do you want to become?

t_ch: 呵。莫非你还要仔细验货？
t_en: Heh. What, you wanna inspect the goods thoroughly?

t_ch: 不，不是验货。正因为她不是货物，才需要确认。人总是最难看清，又最为善变的。
t_en: No, it's not about inspecting goods. It's precisely because she's not merchandise that we need to verify. People are always the hardest to see clearly, and the most fickle of all.

t_ch: 我…想成为…修…仁江…喜欢的人。
t_en: I... want to... become... someone... Sor... ren... likes.

t_ch: 不行。你不能成为我喜欢的人。
t_en: Nah. You can't be someone I like.

t_ch: 修…仁江…不喜欢？
t_en: Sor... ren... doesn't like?

t_ch: 「喜欢」，这个词实在太过变幻无常。我要你成为我理想中的爱人，永远走在我前面。
t_en: "Like" is such a fickle word. I want you to be my ideal lover who always thinks two steps ahead.

t_ch: 明白吗？我可以不懂我喜欢什么，但你必须要懂。当然，我会耐心教你的。
t_en: Got it? I might not know what I like, but you have to. Don't worry though, I'll teach you step by step.

t_ch: 我…会努力。
t_en: I'll... do my best.

t_ch: 哈哈哈。我接了那么多单，你是我见过的最奇怪的客户。看起来坏得很，却又无比纯情！
t_en: Hahaha! Out of all the clients I've had, you're definitely the weirdest one. You look like such a bad boy, but you're actually super innocent!

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>我想要的，是最完美、永远不结束的爱情。</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>What I want is the most perfect, everlasting love.</color>

t_ch: 「沙蒲」。就用这个我从故事里看来的名字称呼你吧。纯粹的，如白花般的少女。
t_en: Sapone. I'll call you by this name I found in a story. A pure maiden, like a white flower.

t_ch: 从现在起，你的名字就是「沙蒲」。
t_en: From now on, your name will be Sapone.

t_ch: 「沙蒲」…我的名字是「沙蒲」。
t_en: Sapone... My name is Sapone.

t_ch: 这就是「沙蒲」与修仁江的初遇。正如修仁江常说的那样——
t_en: This was how Sapone and Sorren first met. Just as Sorren often said...

t_ch: 「故事的开始总是某次不期而遇的邂逅，我一见钟情，而她没有拒绝。突如其来的爱情就这么顺理成章地发生了。」
t_en: "Every story begins with an unexpected encounter. I fell in love at first sight, and she didn't turn me away. Just like that, love blossomed naturally and unexpectedly."

t_ch: 然后，便是妙不可言的热恋。
t_en: And then came a blissful, indescribable romance.

t_ch: 为你准备的礼物，喜欢吗？
t_en: How do you like the gift I prepared for you?

t_ch: 喜欢。尺寸合身，面料也很柔软，穿起来很舒服，款式…没见过。是最近的流行吗？
t_en: I like it. The size fits perfectly, and the fabric is so soft, something really comfortable to wear. The style though... never seen anything like it. Is this the latest trend?

t_ch: 不算吧。这是校服，学生会穿着去学校。真要说，是用来标志身份的服饰。
t_en: Not really. It's a school uniform that students wear to school. If anything, it's more like an outfit that shows your identity.

t_ch: 那…沙蒲是要去学校吗？
t_en: So... Sapone is heading to school then?

t_ch: 不需要。学校教的知识，我都会教你，甚至更多。更何况，在设定上你原本就很聪明。
t_en: That would be unnecessary. I'll teach you everything they teach at school, and even more. Besides, according to your character settings, you're already quite smart.

t_ch: 沙蒲…很聪明。但沙蒲始终想不明白，修仁江喜欢什么。
t_en: Sapone... is smart. But she still can't figure out what Sorren likes.

t_ch: 没人说得清自己究竟喜欢什么。「喜欢」，这个词实在太过虚无缥缈。
t_en: No one can truly explain what they like. "Like" is such an elusive and intangible word.

t_ch: 每天的我都是全新的，我喜欢任何东西都是全心全意的，但我没法阻止自己不断死去。
t_en: Every day, I'm a brand-new version of myself. I love everything with all my heart, but I can't stop myself from dying over and over again.

t_ch: 所以，用尽全力，去喜欢现在喜欢的东西就好，去记住它最绚烂的时候就好。
t_en: So just pour your heart into loving what you love right now, and remember it at its most brilliant moment.

t_ch: 我也会记住，在心里永远记住，沙蒲最漂亮的时候的。
t_en: Meanwhile, I'll keep it in my heart, for as long as I live, the moment when Sapone was at her most beautiful.

t_ch: 沙蒲…最漂亮的时候。是什么时候？
t_en: When Sapone was... at her most beautiful?

t_ch: 哈哈哈。那就是我们未来要共同做的事了，不断去探索，去创造，直到满足为止。
t_en: Hahaha. That's what we'll be doing together from now on: keep exploring and creating until we're satisfied.

t_ch: 好了。把这件衣服换上吧，我很喜欢。
t_en: Alright. Put this outfit on. I really like it.

t_ch: （又要和修仁江出门了。今天…该穿什么衣服？）
t_en: (Going out with Sorren again... What should I wear today?)

t_ch: 很独特的装扮，只在杂志里见到过。
t_en: What a unique outfit. I've only seen it in magazines before.

t_ch: 记得修仁江对它的评价是：「神秘而危险，却有着令人着迷的魔力。」
t_en: I remember Sorren's assessment of it: "Mysterious and dangerous, yet possessing a captivating magic."

t_ch: 沙蒲…不明白。今天要穿这套衣服吗？
t_en: Sapone... doesn't understand. Am I supposed to wear this outfit today?

t_ch: 有些成熟的装扮，电视上很常见。
t_en: This kind of somewhat mature outfit appears on TV all the time.

t_ch: 记得修仁江不是很喜欢，当时的评价是：「活着就是逐渐变无趣的过程，我不想这样。」
t_en: I remember Sorren wasn't too fond of it. His comment at the time was: "Life is a process of gradually becoming boring, and I don't want that."

t_ch: 沙蒲…不明白。今天要穿这套衣服吗？
t_en: Sapone... doesn't understand. Am I supposed to wear this outfit today?

t_ch: 适合出门的装扮，透过窗户可以在街上看到。
t_en: An outfit perfect for going out. You can see people wearing it on the street through the window.

t_ch: 记得修仁江对它不屑一顾，只留下了很简短的评价：「没意思。」
t_en: I remember Sorren dismissed it with contempt, leaving only a brief comment: "Boring."

t_ch: 沙蒲…不明白。今天要穿这套衣服吗？
t_en: Sapone... doesn't understand. Am I supposed to wear this outfit today?

t_ch: …沙蒲？沙蒲？还没换好衣服吗，快点吧，我预约了餐厅。
t_en: ...Sapone? Sapone? Haven't you changed yet? Hurry up, I made a reservation at the restaurant.

t_ch: 没时间犹豫了。从这些服饰中挑一件吧。
t_en: No time to hesitate. Just pick one of these outfits.

t_ch: 打扮得迷人一些。
t_en: Dress to impress.

t_ch: 试试成熟的装扮。
t_en: Try a more mature look.

t_ch: 休闲一点就好。
t_en: Keep it casual.

t_ch: 沙蒲，准备好了吗？出门了。
t_en: Sapone, are you ready? We should head out.

t_ch: 嗯。我在衣橱里找到了好看的衣服。修仁江…喜欢吗？
t_en: Hmm. I found some nice clothes in the closet. Sorren... do you like them?

t_ch: 修仁江…不喜欢吗？
t_en: Sorren... doesn't like?

t_ch: 勉勉强强。挺适合你的，又感觉有哪里不对。我也说不太清，算了，就这样吧。
t_en: Eh, it's passable. It suits you, but something feels off about it. Can't quite put my finger on it... ah whatever, let's just go with it.
...Okay.

t_ch: 我去拿出门的包。上周你给我买的，你说你很喜欢。
t_en: I'll get the bag for going out, the one you bought me last week. You said you really liked it.

t_ch: 带上那款包的话…既然如此，沙蒲，我想到了。还是换回原本的那套衣服吧。
t_en: With that bag... In that case, Sapone, I've got an idea. Why don't you switch back to your original outfit?

t_ch: 和背包的风格更搭，也适合现在的天气。嗯，我今天喜欢那套。
t_en: It matches better with the bag and suits the current weather. Yeah, I like that set today.
...Okay.

t_ch: 哟，修仁江，又和沙蒲出门逛街呢。今天想喝什么？
t_en: Hey, Sorren, out shopping with Sapone again? What would you like to drink today?

t_ch: 最简单的柠檬茶就好。记得，别加任何糖，甜食会冲淡我对幸福的感受。
t_en: Just plain lemon tea will do. Remember, no sugar at all. Sweets would only dilute my sense of happiness.

t_ch: 哈哈，你总是这样，说话像个哲学家似的。沙蒲呢，还是要上次的鲜奶？
t_en: Haha, there you go again, talking like a philosopher! Hey, Sapone, want the same fresh milk as last time?

t_ch: （…上次？我来过这家店吗？）
t_en: (...Last time? Have I been to this store before?)

t_ch: 嗯，就点那个鲜奶。
t_en: Sure, I'll have some fresh milk.

t_ch: 重复过去未免太无趣了。给她柠檬茶吧，今天适合品尝酸味。
t_en: Repeating the past would be too boring. Let's give her lemon tea. Today's perfect for a taste of something sour.

t_ch: 上次…指的是？
t_en: What do you mean by... last time?

t_ch: 忘了吗？就是我们上个月来这家店的时候。给她柠檬茶吧，今天适合品尝酸味。
t_en: Don't you remember? We came to this shop last month. Let's give her lemon tea. Today's perfect for a taste of something sour.

t_ch: 嗯？我记错了？印象里的沙蒲是个嗜甜如命的女孩子，还是你给她点的重糖。
t_en: Huh? Did I remember wrong? I thought Sapone was a girl with a major sweet tooth, or was it you who ordered that extra-sweet drink for her?

t_ch: 都是上个月的事。喜欢的口味会变，很正常。反倒是完全不变才奇怪吧。
t_en: That was last month. It's totally normal to change your favorite tastes. If anything, it'd be weird if they never changed at all.

t_ch: 但我…我不记得……
t_en: But I... I don't remember...

t_ch: 别想那么多。在沙蒲看来，爱情是什么样的呢？
t_en: Don't overthink it. What does love look like to you, Sapone?

t_ch: 甜甜的，像是加糖的鲜奶。
t_en: It's sweet, like milk with sugar.

t_ch: 酸酸的，像是苦涩的柠茶。
t_en: It's sour, like a bitter lemon tea.

t_ch: 无色无味的，像是纯净水。
t_en: It's colorless and tasteless, just like purified water.

t_ch: 我不知道…
t_en: I don't know...

t_ch: 没有自己的观点可不行，纯粹的人偶是不会讨人喜欢的。嗯，我不喜欢。
t_en: Having no opinions of your own won't do. Nobody likes a mere puppet. At least I sure don't.

t_ch: 再给你一次机会，重新想想吧——
t_en: I'll give you another chance. Think it through again...

t_ch: 甜甜的，像是加糖的鲜奶。
t_en: It's sweet, like milk with sugar.

t_ch: 酸酸的，像是苦涩的柠茶。
t_en: It's sour, like a bitter lemon tea.

t_ch: 无色无味的，像是纯净水。
t_en: It's colorless and tasteless, just like purified water.

t_ch: 用饮品作比喻，有趣的答案。但我的沙蒲，你似乎忽视了问题最根本的地方。
t_en: An interesting analogy with beverages, but my dear Sapone, you seem to have overlooked the most fundamental aspect of the question.

t_ch: 现在，你和我在一起，这就是爱情，纯粹的爱情不需要任何外部定义。
t_en: Now, you and I are together, and that's what love is about. Pure love doesn't need any external definition.

t_ch: 抛掉那些物质性的庸俗想法，也不用管别人怎么说，你心里觉得是爱，那就是爱。
t_en: Forget those materialistic, shallow thoughts and what others might say. If your heart tells you it's love, then it's love.

t_ch: （这是爱吗？）
t_en: (Is this love?)

t_ch: （我心里是怎么想的？）
t_en: (What does my heart tell me?)

t_ch: 沙蒲？沙蒲？聊天时候发呆，不是礼貌的行为。我不喜欢。
t_en: Sapone? Sapone? Spacing out during a conversation isn't polite. I don't like that.

t_ch: 嗯。我喜欢和修仁江在一起。
t_en: Hmm. I like being with Sorren.

t_ch: 啧啧，别当着我的面秀啊，每次见你们都在热恋期。哎，修仁江，有什么秘诀吗？
t_en: Tsk tsk, stop flaunting your love in front of me. You two are always in the honeymoon phase whenever I see you. Hey, Sorren, what's your secret?

t_ch: 哈哈哈，能有什么，不过是认认真真、花心思经营自己的爱情罢了。
t_en: Hahaha, it's nothing special. Just putting my heart and soul into nurturing my love life!

t_ch: 这就是「沙蒲」与修仁江的恋情。正如修仁江常说的那样——
t_en: This was the love story between Sapone and Sorren. Just as Sorren often said...

t_ch: 「她和我实在太过契合，至少她很契合我，每个点都完美切中我的喜好。」
t_en: "We are just so compatible, or at least she's compatible with me. Somehow, she just hits all my sweet spots perfectly."

t_ch: 但是，激情的潮水退去后，倦怠感便会迅速浮现。
t_en: However, when the tide of passion recedes, fatigue quickly surfaces.

t_ch: 修仁江，我们出门逛街吧。瞧，我穿了你喜欢的衣服，还会带上你送我的包。
t_en: Sorren, let's go shopping together! Look, I'm wearing the clothes you like, and I'll bring along the bag you gave me.

t_ch: 有空再说。我还约了人打游戏。
t_en: We'll talk about that later. I've got a gaming session lined up.
...All right.

t_ch: 对了！你喜欢的漫画更新了，等你有空，我们一起去书店买吧。我很期待浣熊的故事。
t_en: Oh right! That comic you like got updated. When you're free, let's go to the bookstore together and get it. I can't wait to see what happens in the raccoon's story.

t_ch: 那个啊，我已经在网上看过了。
t_en: Oh that? Well, I already saw it online.

t_ch: 想要什么喝的吗？我帮你去买，你喜欢不加糖的柠檬茶，对不对？
t_en: Want something to drink? I'll go get it for you. Still your lemon tea without sugar, yes?

t_ch: 早喝腻了。别烦我行吗？
t_en: I'm sick of drinking that. Can you just leave me alone?
...All right.

t_ch: （修仁江不喜欢我打扰他。唔，不知道该做些什么…看看电视吧。）
t_en: (Sorren doesn't like being disturbed. Hmm, I'm not sure what to do... I guess I'll watch some TV.)

t_ch: 欢迎大家收看本期《请变幸福吧》！{RUBY_B#欢愉}幸福{RUBY_E#}的真意，你来定义！有请我们今天的待改造嘉宾——
t_en: Welcome to today's episode of Please Be Happy, where YOU define what {RUBY_B#Elation}HAPPINESS{RUBY_E#} truly means! And now, please welcome our guest awaiting transformation...

t_ch: 啊…抱歉，最新消息，那位嘉宾没能撑到节目播出的这天，先一步变为了尘灵。但没关系！我们节目从来不缺乐子专家，有请下一位！
t_en: Ah... sorry, breaking news: Our guest has already turned into a wispae before making it to broadcast day. But no worries! Our show never runs short on funny experts. Let's welcome our next guest!

t_ch: （…好奇怪的节目，但用来打发时间也足够了。）
t_en: (... What a weird show, but it's good enough to kill some time.)

t_ch: 呜呜呜，毫无疑问，我度过了一个相对失败的猫生。那天，我遇见了世界上最漂亮的鸟，我抓住了它，然后关进了笼子里。
t_en: *sob* Without a doubt, I've lived a failed feline life. That day, I met the most beautiful bird in the world, caught it, and locked it up in a cage.

t_ch: 你们知道的，我是世界上最聪明的轻脚，我很清楚如何饲养小鸟，我对它很好，我发誓！可…可是…悲剧还是发生了——
t_en: As you all know, I'm the smartest lightpaw in the world, and I know exactly how to take care of birds. I treated it well, I swear! But... but... tragedy struck anyway...

t_ch: 莫非，你吃了它？
t_en: Please don't tell me you ate it...

t_ch: 不，是它要吃了我！就在昨天早晨，我像往常那样打开笼子，想给它梳毛，可那只鸟，该死的鸟，啄掉了我引以为豪的猫耳！
t_en: No, it tried to eat ME! Just yesterday morning, I opened the cage like usual to groom it, but that bird, that stupid bird, pecked off my precious ear!

t_ch: 现在，我成了缺耳朵。我的身上，永远带着被宠物伤害的疤痕！
t_en: And now, I'm missing an ear. My body will forever bear the scars of being mauled by a pet!

t_ch: 啊，你早该想到，有些鸟注定是关不住的，它们的每片羽毛都闪耀着自由的光辉。
t_en: Ah, you should've known that some birds just can't be caged. Every feather on them shines with the light of freedom.

t_ch: 不过，请问，你现在觉得幸福吗？
t_en: But tell me, are you happy right now?

t_ch: 这是什么地狱笑话吗？
t_en: Is this some kind of dark humor!?

t_ch: 没关系！感谢分享！因为你的痛苦经历，观众们获得了{RUBY_B#欢愉}幸福{RUBY_E#}！被宠物鸟反杀的轻脚，真的很好笑哈哈哈哈哈！
t_en: Never mind! Thanks for sharing! Thanks to your painful experience, our viewers have got some {RUBY_B#Elation}happiness{RUBY_E#}! A lightpaw getting owned by a pet bird, that's soooo hilarious! HAHAHA!

t_ch: 我和你们拼了！！
t_en: Not cool. Oh, you're so dead!!

t_ch: 不要打架，要打去摄像机前面打…这里是《请变幸福吧》，本台记者倾情为您报道！
t_en: Hey, no fighting here! Take it in front of the camera if you insist... This is Please Be Happy, and I'm your dedicated reporter bringing you the latest!

t_ch: 吵死了。就不能安静呆着吗？！教你的那些事都忘了？乖乖听话最重要！
t_en: You're too noisy! Can't you just stay quiet!? Did you forget everything I taught you? Being obedient is the most important thing!

t_ch: 可修仁江上次明明说…不喜欢人偶，别太被动，要有自己的想法……
t_en: But Sorren clearly said last time... that you don't like puppets or passivity, that one needs to have their own thoughts...

t_ch: 上次是上次，不是现在！你是只会跟着命令走的机器吗？我说什么，你就只能做什么？
t_en: That was then, and this is now! Are you some mindless machine who only does what she's told? Can't you think for yourself at all?

t_ch: 不懂我的心思，要你有什么用？！
t_en: If you can't even figure out what I want, what good are you to me!?

t_ch: 对…对…对不起……
t_en: S—So... I'm sorry...
Huff...

t_ch: 沙蒲，对不起。我不该朝你发火的。是啊，我知道，你已经做了你能做的全部了。
t_en: Sapone, I'm sorry. I shouldn't have yelled at you. I know. You were doing the best you could.

t_ch: 诶？这是…什么意思？
t_en: Huh? What... What's that supposed to mean?

t_ch: 我出去走走。我需要重新想想。
t_en: I'm going out for a bit. I need some space to think.

t_ch: 还记得吗，送我衣服的那天，我提出想看学校的生活，所以你带我来了这里。
t_en: Do you remember? The day you gave me this outfit, I said I wanted to see what life at school was like, so you brought me here.

t_ch: 学生真好呀，可以参加社团活动，交到好多朋友，最重要的是…他们的生活总在变化。
t_en: It must be so nice being a student. You get to join clubs, make a bunch of friends, and best of all... their lives are always changing.

t_ch: 啊，没有说现在不好的意思。和你在一起，我很开心。
t_en: Oh, that's not to say I'm not happy now. Being with you makes me very happy.

t_ch: 沙蒲，你希望生活发生变化吗？
t_en: Sapone, do you ever wish your life would change?

t_ch: 为什么…突然问这个？
t_en: Why... are you suddenly asking me this?

t_ch: 我们相处了快一个月，应该对彼此有更深的理解。告诉我吧，我很想知道。
t_en: We've been together for almost a month. I think we should know each other on a deeper level now. Go on, I really want to know what you think.

t_ch: 我…想要安稳的幸福。
t_en: I... want a quiet, happy life.

t_ch: 尝试新的可能…也好。
t_en: I suppose... trying something new could be nice.

t_ch: 我…想要安稳的幸福。
t_en: I... want a quiet, happy life.

t_ch: 尝试新的可能…也好。
t_en: I suppose... trying something new could be nice.

t_ch: 可惜啊，生活不会按你所想的那样发展。变化总会到来，这就是现实，我们无能为力。
t_en: But life doesn't work that way, does it? Change is always coming. That's just how it is, and there's nothing we can do about it.

t_ch: 无论我或你，还是我们之间的爱情——
t_en: Not for me, not for you, and not for the love we share.

t_ch: 能…换个话题吗？
t_en: Could we... talk about something else?

t_ch: 沙蒲。我们分手吧。
t_en: Sapone. We should break up.

t_ch: 我已经厌倦了，你也不再是我喜欢的样子。就让我们记住对方最美好的时候，继续这段感情只会互相消耗，走到这里就够了。好吗？
t_en: I'm bored. And you're not the person I fell in love with anymore. Let's just remember each other at our best. Dragging this out will only drain us both, so let's end it here. Okay?

t_ch: 能告诉我…你不喜欢我的地方吗？
t_en: Could you tell me... what it is about me you don't like?

t_ch: 没有。我找不出任何讨厌你的原因。正因如此，我才讨厌这样的爱情。
t_en: There isn't one. I can't think of a single thing. And that's exactly why I hate this relationship.

t_ch: 你太完美了，每个特点都是我喜欢的。穿衣服的风格，喜欢的饮品，常看的漫画，能笑出来的电视节目…都完全符合我的喜好。
t_en: You're too perfect. Everything about you is exactly what I like. Your style, your favorite drinks, the comics you read, the shows you laugh at... it all fits my tastes perfectly.

t_ch: 就像是在读一本翻阅过许多次的书，没有任何出乎意料的情节。我不喜欢。
t_en: It's like reading a book I've already finished a dozen times. There are no surprises. I hate it.

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>我想要的，是最完美、永远不结束的爱情。</color>若是这段感情即将腐化变质，我宁愿它停在最美好的时候。
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>What I want is a perfect love that lasts forever.</color> If a romance is about to turn sour, I'd rather end it when it's at its most beautiful.

t_ch: 爱情就是这样。当你心中觉得不再爱的时候，爱也就不存在了。怎么抓都抓不住。
t_en: That's just love. When you stop feeling it in your heart, it's already gone. You can't hold onto it, no matter what.

t_ch: 可是…我…我从没有过选择啊！
t_en: But... I... I never even had a choice!

t_ch: 我明白，我都知道。我教过你太多东西，却唯独忘了教会你一件事。
t_en: I know, I know. I taught you so much, but I forgot to teach you one last lesson.

t_ch: 那天的电视节目，我也听到了。鸟不该被关在笼子里，我最后要教给你的，就是——
t_en: I heard what they said on TV that day. A bird isn't meant to be kept in a cage. And the lesson I have for you...

t_ch: …自由。
t_en: ...is freedom.

t_ch: 现在，我给你自由。我们度过了幸福的一个月，如今，你要学着去自己生活。
t_en: And so, I'm setting you free. We had a wonderful month together. And now, you must learn to live for yourself.

t_ch: 去拥抱世界吧，去变得幸福吧，去享受只属于你的生命吧。
t_en: Go on, embrace the world. Find your own happiness. Enjoy the life that is yours alone.

t_ch: 然后…忘了我吧。
t_en: And finally... forget me.

t_ch: 我…我该怎么选择。我的幸福…究竟是什么？
t_en: What am I supposed to choose? My own happiness... What even is that?

t_ch: 不，你要走的路不在这里。回头吧，变得幸福吧。
t_en: No, this isn't the path for you. Turn back. Find your happiness.

t_ch: 去吧，我会为你，还有你的未来，献上最诚挚的祝福。
t_en: Go now. I'll be wishing the very best for you, and for the future that awaits you.

t_ch: 我…我获得了自由？离开他后，我该如何继续自己的生活？
t_en: I'm... I'm free? But now that I've left him... how do I even start to live my own life?

t_ch: 不知道。但记得绒绒号里有说过…「开拓，就是摈弃所有胆怯与茫然，开辟新的道路。」
t_en: I don't know. But I remember what they said on The Fluffy... "To Trailblaze is to cast aside all fear and uncertainty, and forge a new path."

t_ch: 或许…我也可以做到。
t_en: Perhaps... I can do that, too.

t_ch: 我可以在饮品店打工来维持生计，店主肯定不会拒绝的。
t_en: I can get a job at the drink shop to get by. I'm sure the owner wouldn't turn me down.

t_ch: 我有好多衣服，卖掉能换不少钱。我还学过沏茶，学过插花和烹饪，肯定也能派上用场。
t_en: I've got tons of clothes I can sell for some cash. And I know how to make tea, arrange flowers, and cook... all of that must be useful for something.

t_ch: 我还想去上学，想参加社团活动，想交新的朋友，想和大家聊最流行的电视剧和漫画。
t_en: I want to go to school, too. And join clubs, and make new friends... I want to chat with everyone about all the popular shows and comic.

t_ch: 我还想…！
t_en: And I want to...!

t_ch: 风卷起漫天落叶，彻底掩盖了少女的身影，还有那数不清的、对未来的憧憬。
t_en: The wind whips the leaves into a frenzy, swallowing the girl's figure from sight, and with it, all her boundless hopes for the future.

t_ch: 叶片散去时，道路尽头只剩满地的尘灵。
t_en: As the leaves drift away, nothing is left at the end of the road but the wispae scattered across the ground.

t_ch: 名为「沙蒲」的少女，还有她尚未说出口的话语，却是再也不见了。
t_en: The girl named "Sapone," and all the words she never had the chance to speak, are gone without a trace.

t_ch: 哈哈哈…啊哈哈哈哈哈哈哈！
t_en: Hahaha... Mwahahahahahaha!

t_ch: 再见，沙蒲。我最爱的人。我会永远记住…你最漂亮的时候。
t_en: Goodbye, Sapone. My dearest love. I'll always remember you... at your most beautiful.

t_ch: 沙蒲，明天见。
t_en: See you tomorrow, Sapone.

t_ch: 我很早的时候就明白，任何东西都有保质期。杯面会过期，虚拟主播也会过气，喜欢的情绪飘渺不定，就连合法创造的生命，也会随着愿力性质而改变。
t_en: I realized a long time ago that nothing lasts forever. Cup noodles expire, VStreamers lose their fame, the feeling of "like" is fickle, and even a legally created life form changes based on the nature of its Wishpower.

t_ch: 在这个世界上，还有什么是不会过期的？
t_en: Is there anything in this world that truly lasts?

t_ch: 所以，我放弃了，放弃追求永恒了。我要的是，<color=#dbc291ff>最完美、永远不结束的爱情。</color>
t_en: That's why I gave up on chasing "forever." What I want now is <color=#dbc291ff>a perfect love that never ends.</color>

t_ch: 如果爱情即将变质，我就再买一个。
t_en: If our love starts to sour, I'll just get a new one.

t_ch: 你知道的，私自创造的幻造种，拿不到那么多愿力，能维持的时间很短。你确定要爱她？
t_en: You're aware that an unauthorized imagenae can't draw on much Wishpower, right? They don't last long at all. Are you sure you want to love her?

t_ch: 有效期是多久？
t_en: How long will she last?

t_ch: 大概一个月，或者更短。即便加钱也改变不了，我只能做到这个程度。
t_en: A month, maybe. Could be less. And no amount of money will change that. This is the absolute limit of what I can do.

t_ch: 足够了。对经营爱情而言，这个时间绰绰有余。但我有个要求——把画的底版给我。
t_en: That's more than enough time to love. But I have one condition: give me the original copy of the art.

t_ch: 你…莫非是打算……
t_en: You... You're not thinking of...

t_ch: 你真是个恶魔！就连那群愚者都要因你的{RUBY_B#欢愉}企图{RUBY_E#}而感到震撼！
t_en: You're a monster! Even the Fools would be appalled by this twisted {RUBY_B#Elation}scheme{RUBY_E#} of yours!

t_ch: 没有什么是不会过期的。生命如此，愿力如此，爱情亦是如此。那么……
t_en: Nothing lasts forever. Not life, not Wishpower, and certainly not love. So...

t_ch: 只要在过期前，在爱耗尽后，在我彻底感到厌倦的时候，重新把她造出来不就好了？
t_en: ...before she expires, before the love runs dry, just as I'm getting tired of her... I'll just have her remade. Simple, isn't it?

t_ch: 这样，我的爱情就将…<color=#dbc291ff>无比纯粹、绝对完美，永远不会结束。</color>
t_en: And so, my love will be... <color=#dbc291ff>perfectly pure, absolutely perfect, and it will never end.</color>

t_ch: 这就是「沙蒲」与修仁江的告别与重逢。正如修仁江常说的那样——
t_en: And that was the cycle of goodbyes and reunions for "Sapone" and Sorren. Just as Sorren often said...

t_ch: 「人总是会反复爱上同一个人，哪怕千次、万次。」
t_en: "You always end up falling for the same person, again and again. A thousand times, even ten thousand times over."

t_ch: 最后，是漫长的救赎。
t_en: What followed was a long and arduous path to redemption.

t_ch: 喂。你好，是《请变幸福吧》节目吗？对，我有些…独特经历，想要分享。
t_en: Hello? Hi, is this the Please Be Happy show? Yes... I have a rather... unique experience I'd like to share.

t_ch: 对的…确实符合你们的需求，足够悲惨，引人同情，听完就想哭出来。对，不是编的。
t_en: Yes... I'm sure it's just what you're looking for. It's tragic, full of pathos, the kind of thing that will have your audience in tears. And no, I'm not making it up.

t_ch: 下周的访谈节目…可以的，我现在没有安排，有很多时间。好，再联系。
t_en: The talk show next week? Yes, I can do that. My schedule is open, so I have plenty of time. Great, let's be in touch.

t_ch: 嗯，我一定会把自己的遭遇，还有他的真面目…原原本本地告诉所有人。谢谢。
t_en: Yes, I'll make sure to tell the whole world what I've been through... and what he really is. Thank you.

t_ch: 你好，我想请问…治安局该往哪走？
t_en: Hi, I was wondering... which way is it to the Security Bureau?

t_ch: 顺着街道直走，再向左拐，走到头再左拐…我知道了。
t_en: Straight down the street, turn left, go all the way to the end, then another left... Got it.

t_ch: 对，我没怎么出过家门，不太认路。嗯。我是遇到了些不好的事，想寻求帮助。
t_en: Right. I don't get out much, so I'm not familiar with the area. Yeah... Something bad happened, and I need to find some help.

t_ch: 谢谢。没关系，这条路不远，我能自己找过去。再见。
t_en: Thank you. But it's okay, it's not far from here. I can manage on my own. Goodbye.

t_ch: 这封信写给所有的「沙蒲」。
t_en: To all the other "Sapones" out there.

t_ch: 我在家里找到了，修仁江藏起来的画板。原来我们都是，只能活一个月的生命。
t_en: I found it at home, the canvas Sorren kept hidden. It turns out none of us can live for more than a month.

t_ch: 毁掉底版也没有用，只要他愿意，可以无限制地把我们画出来。但我想办法，查到了那个画师的地址。绘绘，创造我们的人。
t_en: It's no use destroying the original copy. He can just keep creating us as long as he wants. But I found a way to track down the artist's address: Graffi, the one who made us.

t_ch: 我不知道她会不会帮我们，但至少，我要把线索传递下去。我不记得自己活了多久，距离一个月的期限还剩多少时间。应该没几分钟了。
t_en: I don't know if she'll help us, but at the very least, I have to pass this information on. I can't remember how long I've existed, or how much time I have until the month is up. It can't be more than a few minutes now.

t_ch: 但要是另一个沙蒲能看到这条信息，我们就还有无限的时间。他算得很准，只会在最后才放我们自由。没人能帮到我们，除了「沙蒲」自己。
t_en: But if another Sapone finds this information, then we have all the time in the world. He has it timed perfectly, only letting us go at the very last second. No one can help us but ourselves, the other "Sapones."

t_ch: 加油。沙蒲。
t_en: You can do it, Sapone.

t_ch: 这封信写给所有的「沙蒲」。
t_en: To all the other "Sapones" out there.

t_ch: 仿佛故事里的情节般，我从睡梦中醒来，如往常那样打开门外的邮箱，却意外在废旧传单的底部，发现了一封写给「沙蒲」的信。
t_en: It was like something out of a story. I woke from a dream, opened the mailbox outside just like any other day, and found a letter addressed to "Sapone" tucked away beneath a stack of junk mail.

t_ch: 读完信，我明白了一切。就像信封上写的那样：「绝对、绝对不要相信修仁江。」
t_en: After reading the letter, it all made sense. It was just like the warning on the envelope: "Whatever you do, do not trust Sorren."

t_ch: 来不及了。我的时间已经所剩无几，我恨为何自己没有早些发现，但还有补救的机会。
t_en: It's too late now. My time is almost up. I hate that I didn't find this sooner, but there's still a chance to set things right.

t_ch: 我把信的内容抄在纸上，藏在他绝对不会注意的地方。不会有人比我更了解他。
t_en: I copied the letter's contents and hid it somewhere he would never look. No one knows him better than I do.

t_ch: 另一个「沙蒲」，请你务必、务必要找到。
t_en: To the next "Sapone": please, you have to find this.

t_ch: 厉害啊！这就是你带着一大包纸条来找我的原因？我从没见过这么强的求生意志。
t_en: Incredible! So that's why you showed up with a bag full of notes? I've never seen such a powerful will to live.

t_ch: 说说看吧，希望我为你做什么？
t_en: Tell me. What can I do for you?

t_ch: 我要向他复仇。我要为所有被他浪费掉人生的「沙蒲」讨回公道。
t_en: I want to take revenge on him. I want to claim justice for all the "Sapones" whose lives he wasted.

t_ch: 即便耗费你剩余的全部愿力，失去神智，变成可怖又令人憎恶的怪物…你也不在乎？
t_en: Even if it means using up all your remaining Wishpower, losing your mind, and becoming a horrifying monster that everyone despises?

t_ch: 我不在乎。与其作为他的附属品而活，不如彻底毁掉。
t_en: Yes. I don't care. I'd rather be utterly destroyed than live as his plaything.

t_ch: 喔，有意思。我可以帮你。来吧，站到这画板前——
t_en: Ooh, interesting. I can help you with that. Come on, stand before this canvas...

t_ch: 如此，你将夙愿得偿。
t_en: And just like that, your wish shall be granted.

t_ch: 呜呜伯
t_en: Wubbaboo

t_ch: 求救…呜呜…呜——帮助，呜呜……
t_en: Help... Wooo... Help... Wooo...

t_ch: 遇到了什么困难？
t_en: Is there any trouble?

t_ch: 需要什么样的帮助？
t_en: What kind of help do you need?

t_ch: 同伴，呜呜呜，危险，呜！
t_en: Companion. Wooo... Danger! Wooo!

t_ch: 坐标，呜…呜呜！帮助，呜！
t_en: Coordinates. Wooo! Help! Wooo!

t_ch: 呜呜伯将一个特殊的坐标标注在了你的终端地图界面上。
t_en: The Wubbaboo marked a special coordinate on your terminal map interface.

t_ch: 拜托…呜呜，同伴，危险危险，呜——！！
t_en: Please... Wooo... Danger! Woo!

t_ch: 尽快，危险，呜呜！呜呜呜！
t_en: Quick. Danger. Wooo! Woooooo!

t_ch: （它好像很着急的样子，还是赶快前往坐标标注的位置吧！）
t_en: (The Wubbaboo seems anxious. Hurry up and go to the marked place!)

t_ch: 怕怕，呜呜…害怕，危险……
t_en: Scared... Wooo... Scared... Dangerous...

t_ch: 谢谢…帮助…呜呜。
t_en: Thank you... help... Wooo.

t_ch: （这下应该就搞定了，回去转告那只着急的呜呜伯一声吧！）
t_en: This should do it. Go back and tell the worried Wubbaboo!

t_ch: 呜呜～感谢呜呜～安全呜呜～报酬呜呜～
t_en: Wooo... Thank you... safe... Reward... Wooo.

t_ch: 麋鹿…密录…呜呜！米露……
t_en: Lots... Losh... Wooo! Loss...

t_ch: 迷……路？
t_en: Lost?

t_ch: 是迷路吧！
t_en: It's lost, right?

t_ch: 呜呜！迷路！迷路！不好…不好呜呜！
t_en: Waah! Lost! Lost! Bad... Bad! Waah!

t_ch: 呜呜，找回，带路，拜托呜呜！
t_en: Wooo. Back... way. Please! Wooo!

t_ch: 呜呜伯将一个范围较大的坐标标注在了你的终端地图上。
t_en: The Wubbaboo marked a relatively large area on your terminal map.

t_ch: 迷鹿…麋鹿不好呜呜！米露，坏呜呜……
t_en: Losh... lots is bad! Loss, bad! Wooo...

t_ch: （虽然只标注了大概的方位，但还是快点过去看看吧！）
t_en: (The direction marked is only approximate, but I must hurry over to have a look!)

t_ch: 左转…右转…再左转…呜呜？
t_en: Turn left, and then turn right, and then left again... Wooo?

t_ch: 转圈…转圈…转圈圈呜呜……
t_en: Turn around... turn around... turn around... Wooo...

t_ch: 这里…哪里？呜呜…那里？哪里？呜呜！
t_en: Here...where? Wooo... Where? Where? Wooo!

t_ch: 晕晕，呜——迷失，呜呜……
t_en: Dizzy... Lost... Wooo...

t_ch: 前…后…呜…右……？
t_en: Front... Back... wooo... Right...?

t_ch: （看上去头脑不是很清醒的样子，给它指路真的能看懂吗？）
t_en: (It doesn't look very clear-headed. Can it really remember all the directions I gave?)

t_ch: （还是有点不放心…回去和那只担忧的呜呜伯确认一下吧！）
t_en: (I'm still a little worried... Might as well go back and check with that worried Wubbaboo!)

t_ch: 回家，回来，归来，呜呜～团圆，团结，团建，呜呜～
t_en: Home, back, here, wooo... Together, unity, team building, wooo...

t_ch: 谢谢，靴靴，鞋鞋，雪蟹，呜呜～
t_en: Thank you... Tank you... Tank... Wooo...

t_ch: （虽然表达的意思有点混乱，但看它的样子很开心，应该都全部找到回来的路了。）
t_en: What it said is weird, but it looks happy. Everyone should have found their way home.

t_ch: 听说你找我有事…
t_en: I heard you have something to tell me...

t_ch: 哎唷，这不是陪我和老斑鸠瞎折腾的那{F#丫头}{M#小子}吗！果然还是你有良心，知道来看看老爹的近况。
t_en: Well if it isn't the kid from last time! At least you have enough conscience to come hang out with this old fart.

t_ch: 老爹找你也没什么大事，就是顶着这把老骨头，每天还要处理阻塞，实在是干不动了……
t_en: It's nothing important. Just that lately I've had to go fix those blockages every day. I can't move my old bones anymore.

t_ch: 上次为了检修自己攒的星系摩托，差点把机修间闯出个大洞，步了何塞•拉萨罗的后尘。
t_en: Last time, when I was fixing my motorcycle, I almost knocked down the wall of the maintenance room, like Hosea Lazaro did.

t_ch: 你大爷还是你大爷。
t_en: Wow, that's so cool.

t_ch: 嚯，这算啥？有机会领你去月台的隐蔽角落看看我攒的星系大奔，那才叫开眼哪！
t_en: Pff, that's nothing. Next time I should take you to see the galaxy-class Rose Roydz I hid in the corner of the railway platform. Now that's an eye-opener!

t_ch: 不过这都是后话。现在，只要你能替我找来3个「超镍零件」，老爹的独门手艺、银河至味「卡利白」，那是一定管够！
t_en: But that's all for later. Now, if you can find me 3 Ultra Nickel Parts, I'll treat you to as many Kapo-Kali as you want!

t_ch: 听起来完全不像干不动…
t_en: It doesn't sound like you can't move at all...

t_ch: 真的，老爹不骗你，哎唷，说着说着我这浑身上下就疼起来了……
t_en: Really, I am not lying to you. Ouch, I hurt all over...

t_ch: 舌头、牙齿、嘴皮子都疼，没法儿再和你这{F#丫头}{M#小子}瞎扯了。
t_en: My tongue, teeth, and my mouth hurt. I can't keep talking nonsense with you, kid.

t_ch: 你快替我找来3个「超镍零件」，作为回报，老爹的独门手艺、银河至味「卡利白」，那是一定管够！
t_en: Now hurry, find me 3 Ultra Nickel Parts. In return, you can have all the Kapo-Kali you want!

t_ch: 所以你想来折腾我。
t_en: So you want to order me around.

t_ch: 欸，怎么是折腾呢？年轻人多吃多干，一辈子才能没病没灾。
t_en: Hey, how is that ordering you around? Young people should eat more and work more, that's how you stay healthy and out of trouble.

t_ch: 更别提如今你只要替我找来3个「超镍零件」，老爹的独门手艺、银河至味「卡利白」，那是一定管够！
t_en: Not to mention, you just have to find 3 Ultra Nickel Parts for me and you can have all the Kapo-Kali you want!

t_ch: 多少人就馋这一口哪…一口快乐无边，两口赛过神仙。
t_en: You have no idea, the kind of things folks are willing to do just for a sip of that... elixir from heaven!

t_ch: 快去快去，别废话了，老爹等你的好消息！
t_en: Go, go, enough chit-chatting. I'll be waiting!

t_ch: 这是你要的零件。
t_en: Here are the parts you want.

t_ch: 干得好呀{F#丫头}{M#小子}！
t_en: Well done, {F#lass}{M#boy}!

t_ch: 有了这玩意儿，就不愁我那星系摩…不，是空间站的设备再出岔子了！
t_en: With these fine parts, I won't have to worry about my galaxy-class motorcy... I mean, the space station equipment breaking down again!

t_ch: 这是老爹答应你的「卡利白」，新鲜酿制，汽足着哪！老爹我啊，去鼓捣摩…那堆机器去啰。
t_en: Here's the "Kapo-Kali" I promised. It's freshly brewed and full of fizz! Off I go, gotta fix that moto... space station equipment.

t_ch: 好再来！
t_en: Okay, laters!

t_ch: 听说你找我有事…
t_en: I heard you have something to tell me...

t_ch: 是的，你没听错。这件事还是交给你这种年轻人来比较好。
t_en: Yes, you are right. Some things are better left to a youngster like you.

t_ch: 是这样的，我想请你给一位仿生人当老师，教她为人处世和一些做人的知识。
t_en: You see, I'd like you to be a teacher for an android. Teach her about life and how to handle her relationship with others.

t_ch: 你阅历丰富，为什么不自己教？
t_en: You're more learned about these. Why not teach her yourself?

t_ch: 我早就试过了，可惜结果不太理想。早先我制作的原型机<unbreak>157</unbreak>虽然有了一定自主思考的能力，但她对这个世界的疑惑，我却无法解答。
t_en: I did, but the result was not ideal. Although Prototype <unbreak>157</unbreak> I made earlier had independent thinking capability to a certain degree, I couldn't answer her questions about our world.

t_ch: 若是研究知识我还能传授一二，但这个世界的发展日新月异，有些事情，只有你们年轻人才能跟得上那股浪潮。
t_en: I can teach her theories, but the world is ever-changing. There are things that only you young people can keep up with.

t_ch: 空间站里的年轻人多得是。
t_en: The space station is teeming with young people.

t_ch: 并非每个人都愿意与仿生人接触，况且…他们愿意教她的也就是些科研知识，至于为人处世方面的事，却是不如你合适。
t_en: Not everyone is willing to deal with an android. Besides... They are only willing to teach her things related to scientific research. When it comes to teaching her facts of life, you are a better candidate than them.

t_ch: 你在空间站里做的事我也有所耳闻，在我看来你的人品也称得上是这里数一数二的了。
t_en: I've heard of your deeds in the space station. In my opinion, you're among the best of us.

t_ch: 而我刚制作出来没多久的原型机<unbreak>159</unbreak>…虽然我已经限制过她自主思考的权限，但她的学习能力与速度还是远超常人。
t_en: And I just made Prototype <unbreak>159</unbreak>... Although I have limited her capacity to think independently, she learns better and faster than most.

t_ch: 在没有一个「正经人」带路，帮她塑造出符合人类道德标准的良好人格之前。我可不敢放任她钻研高深的理论…万一她有什么二心，那后果就不堪设想了。
t_en: Without a "decent person" to show her the way and shape her personality to be in line with human moral standards, I dare not let her delve into advanced theories... If she develops any deviant thoughts, the consequences could be unimaginable.

t_ch: 你就不怕我教坏她吗？
t_en: Aren't you worried I might lead her astray?

t_ch: 不怕，我对你有信心，况且我只是让你教她些人类生活上的事情，娱乐消遣、兴趣爱好这些，想来也不会出什么大问题。
t_en: No, I have confidence in you. Besides, I am just asking you to show her what our daily life is like. Things like entertainment and hobbies. I don't think there will be any big problems.

t_ch: 我都不知道能教她什么…
t_en: I don't know what I can teach her...

t_ch: 这个简单，教她怎么做人，其实就是传授些你平时的吃喝喜好、娱乐消遣，把这些告诉她，让她自主学习就好。
t_en: Simple. Tell her about the foods and drinks you like, or what you do when you have spare time. She'll turn these into her own knowledge.

t_ch: 你觉得她应该成为什么样的人，培养怎样的兴趣爱好，平时该做些什么…尽管告诉她就好，这些就是她未来要学习的东西。
t_en: Tell her what kind of person she should be, things to do for fun, what we do every day... Tell her all you know and she'll pick them up one by one.

t_ch: 至于具体的方向和计划，就拜托你来指点下她吧。
t_en: As for the specifics about the teaching plan, it's totally up to you.

t_ch: 今天还要来教希拉吗？
t_en: Do you still need me to teach Sheila today?

t_ch: 就昨天希拉展现出来的情况来看，我总感觉这样还不够好。当然，我很感激你的用心教导……
t_en: Judging from Sheila's performance yesterday, I don't think it was good enough. Of course, I appreciate your hard work...

t_ch: 但她毕竟是个仿生人，我不希望看到她误入歧途做出什么伤害人类的事。
t_en: But she is an android after all. I don't want to see her go astray and do anything harmful to human beings.

t_ch: 我重置了她昨天的记忆数据…今天的她就是一张白纸，会画出什么样图案，就看你的发挥了。
t_en: I reset her memory from yesterday... Today she is a blank slate. What she will learn today is up to you.

t_ch: 所以今天还要麻烦你继续担任她的老师，再教教她到底该怎么做人。
t_en: Please continue to be her teacher today and tell her a bit more about how to navigate our world.

t_ch: 古恩让我当你的老师。
t_en: Gunn made me your teacher.

t_ch: 古恩先生…好的，老师好，请多指教。
t_en: Mr. Gunn... Okay, {M#mister}{F#miss}, please teach me.

t_ch: 我虽掌握了许多深奥的知识，但和普通人类之间还有很大的差距。我想和大家一样，成为真正的人类。
t_en: Although I have mastered a lot of advanced knowledge, there is still a big gap between me and ordinary humans. I want to be a real human like everyone else.

t_ch: 你有什么兴趣爱好吗？
t_en: Do you have any hobbies?

t_ch: 学习就是我的全部爱好，我总觉得学的还不够多，要追上大家的脚步，我还差得远呢。
t_en: Learning is my only hobby. I can never feel like I have learned enough. I have a long way to go.

t_ch: 你平时都做些什么？
t_en: What do you usually get up to around here?

t_ch: 学习前沿科学的理论知识，为法政科和空间站的大家提供辅助服务，以及…等待古恩先生的升级与维修。
t_en: Learn cutting-edge scientific theories, support the department of Galactic Geopolitics and the space station, and... wait for Mr. Gunn to give me upgrades and maintenance.

t_ch: 你就没有点个人生活吗？
t_en: Did anyone teach you about work-life balance?

t_ch: 个人生活，是休息吗？我也有休息时间的，在没有命令和没拿到新的科研文件之前，我偶尔也会待机不动，站在这里看着空间站发呆。
t_en: Work-life balance? You mean taking a break? I do that actually. When there's no new commands to follow or documents to process, I'd stand still and zone out.

t_ch: 这不叫个人生活。
t_en: That's not work-life balance.

t_ch: 好的，笔记已记录。
t_en: Got it, note recorded.

t_ch: 你应该培养点兴趣爱好。
t_en: You should develop some hobbies.

t_ch: 这…要怎么培养呢？请指导我，{NICKNAME}老师。
t_en: How? Please give me some guidance, {NICKNAME}.

t_ch: （教她消遣娱乐，享受生活）
t_en: (Teach her how to have fun and enjoy her life.)

t_ch: 我已经搜索到相关知识点了。音乐、小说、萌宠…美食，美食，美食…无法进食，排除。
t_en: I have searched some relevant facts. Music, novels, and pets... Food, food, food... Unable to eat, search result excluded.
